Author: OOFGames
Name: Chocobo Racing Gamba
Description: Players pick a chocobo(s) to bet on, the host rolls /random to advance chocobos, and the first to reach the finish line wins. Type /crg or /Chocoboracinggamba to open the main window.
Punchline: Host Chocobo Racing Gamba with your friends in Eorzea!
Changelog:
- Added auto payout service to automatically pay out winners.
- Added a new setting to let you split out the bet list by player instead of chocobos. Some might find it easier to see who they've bet on this way.

Author: OOFGames
Name: Gamba Where
Description: Browse active gambling events across Eorzea or host your own session. Use /gambawhere to open the interface.
Punchline: Find and host FFXIV gambling events near you.
Changelog:
- Live gamba will now display on the minimap. These are coolour coded to each game type. Go to settings > UI to toggle which games you want to see on the mini maps and what colours are associated with each game type. Hover over the icon to see live game information.
- You can now create a pf within the plugin. This will open up the recruitment for you and fill in the description with your game, venue and location. Feel free to change any info and start recruitment. A new find in pf button has been added to cards. This will open PF and search for the player. It will let you know if they cannot find one or open it up if there is.

Author: OOFGames
Name: Mini Games Emporium
Description: A plugin to manage mini game sessions, player queues, and Gil transactions. Use /minigames to open the main window.
Punchline: Host BAR 777 and other mini games with automated queue management.
Changelog:
- Changed winning number minimum for BAR 777 to 0.
- Added new option to BAR 777 to allow taken in trades to add to the pot.
